# What Is Chapter 7 Bankruptcy? -- Complete Guide [2026]
> What is Chapter 7 bankruptcy? Eligibility, means test, exemptions, timeline, and what debts get discharged. Free 2026 guide with calculator.

## About
whatischapter7.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Asset Limits and Exemptions -- What You Can Keep: https://whatischapter7.com/asset-limits.html
- Chapter 7 Discharge: What Debts Are Eliminated? (2026): https://whatischapter7.com/chapter-7-discharge.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Process: Start to Finish (2026): https://whatischapter7.com/chapter-7-process.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy and Your Credit Score -- Impact and Recovery: https://whatischapter7.com/credit-score.html
- Federal Bankruptcy Exemptions: Complete List Under 11 U.S.C. 522(d): https://whatischapter7.com/federal-exemptions.html
- Homestead Exemption in Bankruptcy: Can I Keep My House?: https://whatischapter7.com/homestead.html
- What Is Chapter 7 Bankruptcy? -- Complete Guide: https://whatischapter7.com/
- Retirement Accounts in Bankruptcy: Are They Protected?: https://whatischapter7.com/retirement.html
- State Bankruptcy Exemptions: 50-State Overview: https://whatischapter7.com/state-exemptions.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Timeline: Filing to Discharge: https://whatischapter7.com/timeline.html
- Vehicle Exemption in Bankruptcy: Can I Keep My Car?: https://whatischapter7.com/vehicles.html
- What You Keep in Chapter 7 Bankruptcy (2026): https://whatischapter7.com/what-you-keep.html
- What You Might Lose in Chapter 7 Bankruptcy (2026): https://whatischapter7.com/what-you-lose.html
- Who Qualifies for Chapter 7 Bankruptcy? (2026): https://whatischapter7.com/who-qualifies.html
- The Wildcard Exemption: Protecting Any Property in Bankruptcy: https://whatischapter7.com/wildcard.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
